nameMeanings.name: Tedmarsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tidmarsh in Berkshire, which is named from Old English thēod ‘people’ + mersc ‘marsh’.

variants.name: Titmus
meanings: English (Hertfordshire): variant of Titchmarsh, a habitational name from Titchmarsh in Northamptonshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Ticcea + Old English mersc ‘marsh’. The surname became associated by folk etymology with the word titmouse (Middle English titmose), denoting a small songbird. There may have been some confusion with Tidmarsh .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh was born in 1291, in Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of Hugh de TEDMARSH. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with John de Stretley.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh est née en 1291, à Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Hugh de TEDMARSH. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec John de Stretley.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh wurde 1291 in Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, England, als Tochter von Hugh de TEDMARSH geboren. Sie hatte mit John de Stretley mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh è nata il nel 1291 nel Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, England come figlia di Hugh de TEDMARSH. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con John de Stretley.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh(은)는 1291년 영국 벅잉함실르 멘트모어에서 Hugh de TEDMARSH의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John de Stretley(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh nasceu em 1291, em Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Hugh de TEDMARSH. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com John de Stretley.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh родилась в 1291 г. в местности ментмор, буккингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали Hugh de TEDMARSH. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от John de Stretley.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tedmarsh nació en 1291, en Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de Hugh de TEDMARSH. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con John de Stretley.
